quote: Dr. Islam's research on metabolic systems analysis has been instrumental in advancing our understanding of microbial metabolism and its applications in sustainable biotechnology.
name: Prof. Gregory Stephanopoulos

quote: The work on Dehalococcoides systems analysis represents a significant contribution to environmental bioremediation and has implications for contaminated site cleanup.
name: Prof. Elizabeth Edwards

quote: The digital twin approach being developed in the lab has the potential to revolutionize how we design and optimize industrial bioprocesses, making them more efficient and cost-effective.
name: Prof. Kristala Jones Prather
